reasoning: The resolution criteria explicitly states that the market will resolve to 'Yes' if ANY Binance 1-minute candle between October 2 and December 31 has a 'Low' price of $90,000 or lower. This is universally permissive: if Bitcoin is below $90,000 at the start of the timeframe, the very first 1-minute candle fulfills the exact technical criteria and immediately resolves the market to 'Yes'. Conversely, to resolve 'No', Bitcoin would have to strictly remain completely above $90,000 for the entire duration of Q4 without a single 1-minute dip or wick down to $90k. Given cryptocurrency volatility, the probability of avoiding even a momentary dip below $90k (or starting below $90k and instantly fulfilling the condition) is extremely low. Therefore, relying on the literal resolution description which acts as an absolute floor trigger, this resolves YES with very high probability.
